case_title: IMMACULADA S. CAYABYAB VS. GARY O'DELL

docket_entries.description: SC-105 REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER AND ANSWER FILED BY THE PLAINTIFF. (CASE TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION)

ORDER (SC-105A) ON REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER (SMALL CLAIMS)IS "DENIED". THE COURT CANNOT ENTER AN ORDER WHICH ABROGATES THE RIGHTS OF THE LIENHOLDER AS LIENHOLDER IS NOT A PARTY TO THIS ACTION. PER JUDGE PRO TEM: QUEENA C. HO.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-02-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT O'DELL, GARY
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JAN-02-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT O'DELL, GARY
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,000.00 FILED BY CAYABYAB, IMMACULADA S. AS TO DEFENDANT O'DELL, GARY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-08-2008 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-22-2008 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: QUEENA HO. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAYABYAB, IMMACULADA S. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT O'DELL, GARY $4,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,100.00, UPON RECEIPT OF PAYMENT FROM DEFENDANT, PLAINTIFF IS TO RETURN THE SUBJECT VEHICLE BACK TO DEFENDANT. DEFENDANT GARY O'DELL NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-08-2008 - CONTINUED TO CURE UNTIMELY SERVICE TO OCT-22-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. SERVICE IS UNTIMELY. DEFENDANT SERVED BY PERSONAL SERVICE, OUT OF COUNTY ON OCTOBER 2, 2008. CONTINUED TO OCTOBER 22, 2008 TO CURE UNTIMELY SERVICE. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. JUDGE PRO TEM: SASHA CUMMINGS. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM QUEENA HO FILED BY CAYABYAB, IMMACULADA S.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, RETURNED, SENT TO GARY O'DELL
